title: Interpretable and integrative deep learning for discovering brain-behaviour associations
author: Ambroise, Corentin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This record contains the code of the paper " Interpretable and integrative deep learning for discovering brain-behaviour associations ". In this paper, we employ a digital avatar procedure as an interpretability module capable of reporting the relationships learned within a multi-view variational autoencoder. We integrate this procedure into a novel framework that utilises stability selection to identify meaningful and reproducible associations between brain imaging and behaviour.
